zh.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾素爾
zh.Emley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾艾姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dionysia Fitzwilliam於大約1324年出生在英國越可爾艾姆利時，她的父親William FitzWilliam72歲，母親Isabel Maud Deincourt50歲。她和Sir Henry Sothill III Knight至少有2個兒子。她去世於1399年之後在英國越可爾利朋，埋葬在英國越可爾利朋。

zh-hans.Soothill, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾素爾
zh-hans.Emley, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾艾姆利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dionysia Fitzwilliam于大约1324年出生在英国越可爾艾姆利时，她的父亲William FitzWilliam72岁，母亲Isabel Maud Deincourt50岁。她和Sir Henry Sothill III Knight至少有2个儿子。她去世于1399年之后在英国越可爾利朋，埋葬在英国越可爾利朋。

nameMeanings.name: Fitzwilliam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (of Norman origin): from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name William .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Dionysia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Denise ; see Dennis . This form was in use in northern England from the 14th to the 17th century; the short form Dye is the source of the surname Dyson.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Dionysia Fitzwilliam was born about 1324, in Emley, Yorkshire, England, her father, William FitzWilliam, was 72 and her mother, Isabel Maud Deincourt, was 50. She had at least 2 sons with Sir Henry Sothill III Knight. She died after 1399, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Ripon, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dionysia Fitzwilliam est née environ 1324, à Emley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William FitzWilliam, avait 72 ans et sa mère, Isabel Maud Deincourt, avait 50 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Sir Henry Sothill III Knight. Elle est décédée après 1399, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dionysia Fitzwilliam um 1324 in Emley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzWilliam 72 und ihre Mutter Isabel Maud Deincourt 50. Sie hatte mit Sir Henry Sothill III Knight mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1399 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Ripon, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Fitzwilliam è nata il circa 1324 nel Emley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William FitzWilliam, aveva 72 anni e sua madre, Isabel Maud Deincourt, aveva 50 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Sir Henry Sothill III Knight. Morì dopo il 1399, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Ripon, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dionysia Fitzwilliamが約1324年にイギリスヨークシュアイアエムリーで生まれた時，父William FitzWilliamは72歳，母Isabel Maud Deincourtは50歳であった。彼女はSir Henry Sothill III Knightとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1399年以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアリプオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dionysia Fitzwilliam(이)가 대략 1324년 영국 요르크실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzWilliam(은)는 72세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Maud Deincourt(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 Sir Henry Sothill III Knight(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 이후 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 리폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dionysia Fitzwilliam nasceu aproximadamente 1324, em Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzWilliam, tinha 72 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Maud Deincourt, tinha 50 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Sir Henry Sothill III Knight. Ela faleceu após 1399, em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dionysia Fitzwilliam родилась около 1324 г. в местности эмли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzWilliam было 72 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Maud Deincourt, 50. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Sir Henry Sothill III Knight. Она умерла после 1399 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dionysia Fitzwilliam nació aproximadamente 1324, en Emley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzWilliam, tenía 72 años y su mamá, Isabel Maud Deincourt, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Sir Henry Sothill III Knight. Murió después de 1399, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
